name: ephapax-mcp
description: Ephapax Cartridge — Proof-compiler query tools for formal verification workflows
author: Jonathan D.A. Jewell <j.d.a.jewell@open.ac.uk>

tools.name: Query Proof
tools.description: Query proof metadata by theorem name (status, complexity, dependencies)

tools.name: List Proven Theorems
tools.description: List all proven theorems in a module

tools.name: Type Check Expression
tools.description: Type-check an expression against the proof-compiler type system

tools.name: Analyze Proof
tools.description: Analyze proof complexity, size, and dependency tree

tools.name: Validate Theorem
tools.description: Validate that a theorem's proof is closed (Qed, not Admitted)
